# Anduril Demonstrates and Delivers Counter-UAS Capabilities to USNORTHCOM at Falcon Peak 25.2

Anduril delivers counter-UAS capabilities to USNORTHCOM at Falcon Peak 25.2, showcasing advanced drone defense and detection systems.
